promos.title: 15% Off Early Bird Booking
promos.description: Book your wedding or major event at least 6 months in advance and receive a 15% discount on our planning and coordination fees.
terms: Cannot be combined with other percentage discounts
promos.fullDetails:
This offer is designed for couples who plan ahead. By booking our services at least 6 months prior to your event date, you secure our top-tier planning team at a 15% discounted rate.

Cancellation & Refunds:
- Cancellations made within 14 days of booking are eligible for a full refund of the deposit.
- Cancellations made after 14 days but before 90 days of the event will incur a 25% cancellation fee.
- No refunds are provided for cancellations within 90 days of the event.

Agreements:
- The discount applies strictly to the 'planning and coordination' portion of the invoice.
- Third-party vendor costs (catering, venue, etc.) are not subject to this discount.

promos.title: Free Luxury Invitation Cards
promos.description: Get complimentary premium digital and physical invitation cards when you book any of our Full Wedding Planning packages.
terms: Valid for Full Wedding Planning packages only
promos.fullDetails:
Elevate your guests' first impression with our bespoke luxury invitation cards, completely free when you opt for our Full Wedding Planning package.

Cancellation & Refunds:
- If the wedding planning package is cancelled, the cost of any printed invitations will be deducted from the refundable amount.
- Digital designs remain the property of YA Wedding until the final package payment is made.

Agreements:
- Includes up to 3 design revisions.
- Additional physical cards beyond the 200 limit will be charged at standard rates.
- Shipping costs for physical cards outside the UAE are not included.

promos.title: AED 1,000 - 6,000 Discount
promos.description: Receive an instant discount or cashback between AED 1,000 and AED 6,000 when booking premium venue and decor packages.
terms: Discount amount depends on total package value
Applicable to premium decor and venue bookings
promos.fullDetails:
Maximize your budget with our tiered discount system for premium bookings. The more comprehensive your package, the larger your instant discount.

Cancellation & Refunds:
- In the event of a cancellation, the discount is voided, and standard cancellation terms apply to the original gross amount.
- Cashback (if chosen over instant discount) is processed 14 days after the successful completion of the event.

Agreements:
- AED 1,000 discount applies to packages over AED 20,000.
- AED 6,000 discount applies to packages over AED 100,000.
- Cannot be combined with the Early Bird 15% discount.

promos.title: Free Online Planner Claim
promos.description: Start planning your dream wedding right now with our interactive online package builder. Claim your free session today.
promos.fullDetails:
Take control of your wedding planning with our state-of-the-art online package builder. Mix and match services, select your celebrations, and get an instant estimate.

Cancellation & Refunds:
- The online planner is a free tool and does not require any upfront payment or commitment.
- No refunds or cancellations apply to the use of this digital tool.

Agreements:
- Estimates provided by the online planner are subject to final confirmation by our team.
- Prices may vary based on specific dates, availability, and custom requests not covered in the standard tool.
